inline_comments.message:
cloud-epa-caps is the property of cloud region from AAI schema v11, there is no HPA terminology at that time. 
Changing from cloud-epa-caps to cloud-hpa-caps only from multicloud side will break up the integration between multilcoud and AAI. On the other hand, backward compatibility is very important which is also a principle of ONAP, this change will violate the principle of backward compatibility as well.
